title: Iran Data Portal — Housing & Urban Development tables (construction permits, housing stock, land/floor prices, rentals)
source_org: Iran Data Portal (Syracuse University Moynihan Institute)

files.name: housing_permits_by_type_and_sector_1991-2006.xls
files.table_title: Number of Housing Units Determined in Construction Permits Issued in Urban Areas by Type of Permit and Sector, 1370-1385 (1991-2006)

files.name: conventional_housing_units_by_settled_households_1966-2006.xlsx
files.table_title: Conventional Housing Units by the Number of Private Settled Households, 1345-1385 (1966-2006)

files.name: avg_land_price_per_sqm_selected_cities.xlsx
files.table_title: Average Price of Land per Square Metre for Dilapidated Residential Buildings Transacted in Real Estate Agencies, by Selected Cities

files.name: avg_floor_area_price_per_sqm_selected_cities_1996-2005.xlsx
files.table_title: Average Price of Floor Area per Square Metre of Housing Units Transacted in Real Estate Agencies, by Selected Cities, 1375-1384 (1996-2005)

units: described within each spreadsheet/PDF (rial, physical quantities, index points, etc.)
license_terms: Iran Data Portal public academic mirror; underlying data originally from SCI/CBI/ministries, no explicit license stated on site
notes: irandataportal.syr.edu was directly reachable (HTTP 200, no bot-challenge or geo-block) — no Wayback fallback needed for this source. Original tables are mirrors of Statistical Centre of Iran (SCI) Statistical Yearbook data and CBI series, re-hosted in English-labeled Excel/PDF format by Syracuse University's Moynihan Institute. Selected the most data-rich, economically relevant tables from this topic page (and its listed sub-topic pages) to avoid duplicating files already downloaded by other sessions into iran-plan-budget-org (five-year development plans, annual budget laws) and iran-census (census data) folders in this same repo.
